channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog waste bag left on grass verge, 20th March
item.description:
Another dog owner has started leaving dog bags on the grass verge in Townshend Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townshend Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on street to be cleared, 20th March
item.description:
Flytipping next to bin to be cleared

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Adys Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping rubbish on the road, 20th March
item.description:
There has been fly tipping of rubbish obstructing the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crouch Croft, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed vehicle window glass, 20th March
item.description:
Occured earlier in the week. No action taken to sweep or clean. Hazardous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Andrew's Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty tree space, 20th March
item.description:
Dead tree was removed from grass verge in Townshend Road last year. Could we have another one to replace it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townshend Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is no green light for pedestrians, 20th March
item.description:
Since Thursday, March 19, 2026, pedestrian traffic lights have been out of service at this very busy intersection. This is very dangerous, especially since there are two schools nearby.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Parsonage Lane, Southbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal, 20th March
item.description:
Someone has hit a cat and placed the dead cat between mine and my neighbours drive. I assume from this morning or last night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidcup Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass all over path at traffic lights peckham rye, 20th March
item.description:
Broken glass all over path at traffic lights peckham rye

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside and opposit NISA, 20th March
item.description:
Flytipping outside and opposit NISA to be cleared asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 20th March
item.description:
Bags of rubbish left near street sign of Ravensworth rd, near mini roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widecombe Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: We have moved up the pole but needs to be higher and better tightened, 20th March
item.description:
Slipped down and causing trip hazard and attractive to children to mess about with. Have moved up the pole as best we can for now but probably needs to be higher.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overbury Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting, 20th March
item.description:
Flyposting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Dog waste bin overflowing, 20th March
item.description:
Dog waste bin is overflowing and dog waste all over path. Please clean urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Kennel Hill, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Light not upgraded to LED, 20th March

item.title: Large Electrical kitchen item dumped, 20th March

This eyesore has been dumped on the green at the back of Fordwich Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bicknor Road, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: Various path defects, 20th March
item.description:
There are various defects along this path (heading towards town side of the road. ) These range from kirb stones damaged, slabs broken etc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow lines worn away, 20th March
item.description:
There should be a yellow line across this drop curb but it has completely worn away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Drive, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
